plugins.name: 37signals
plugins.description: 37signals-inspired Rails, product design, shaping, work, and DHH judgment skills grounded in public sources.

interface.shortDescription: Rails, product, and work judgment inspired by 37signals.
interface.longDescription: A single 37signals-inspired skill plugin covering Rails architecture, Hotwire, Kamal, product/interface design, Shape Up style shaping, REWORK-style scope discipline, calm work, and DHH Rails judgment. Community-maintained, source-grounded, and not an official 37signals or Basecamp plugin.
defaultPrompt: Use 37signals skills to implement this Rails feature with source-grounded conventions.
Use 37signals product design to simplify this interface around the epicenter.
Use 37signals Shape Up and Rework judgment to prune this idea before implementation.

plugins.name: fizzy
plugins.description: Fizzy workflows for boards, cards, comments, setup, self-hosted management, and MCP connector access.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Fizzy from the CLI or self-hosted MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Fizzy automation for boards, cards, comments, setup, self-hosted workflows, and connector-native MCP access. Prefer the CLI for local shell work and the MCP server for ChatGPT/Codex connector flows.
defaultPrompt: Set up the Fizzy CLI or MCP server for the hosted instance.
List boards and summarize active work in Fizzy.
Manage Fizzy cards and comments from the CLI or MCP.

plugins.name: rcc
plugins.description: Focused RCC-family skills for RCC itself, robots, holotree environments, work items, Action Server packages, and CI maintenance.

interface.shortDescription: Focused RCC skills for RCC core, robots, work items, action packages, and CI maintenance.
interface.longDescription: RCC-family workflows split into focused skills for RCC CLI/source orientation, robot scaffolding and holotree environments, work item adapters, ordinary Action Server packages, and RCC-powered CI maintenance.
defaultPrompt: Choose the right RCC specialist skill for this task.
Orient me in RCC source, holotree, caches, endpoints, or templates.
Debug this robot.yaml or conda.yaml setup.
Design a local work item queue or adapter flow.
Set up RCC-powered CI maintenance safely.
